_note: Hand-curated gold set of UNAMBIGUOUS claim<->evidence relations from the Meridian v TechFlow bundle, for calibrating the two-stage LLM judge. Truth assigned by a human (controller) reading the documents, NOT by the LLM that produced the seed matrix — so this is an independent check, not circular. Each item: the pleaded claim text, the source doc, and the expected relation.

pairs.claim: The Platform was unavailable for more than 40% of trading hours during November and December 2024
pairs.why: Whitfield expert puts platform-attributable downtime at ~6.2% and finds no support for 40%

pairs.claim: Meridian did not at any time request any change to the agreed scope of the works
pairs.why: Change Order No.3 is expressly 'at the Customer's request' for the loyalty module

pairs.claim: Meridian repeatedly warned TechFlow the Platform was not ready and requested that go-live be deferred; TechFlow ignored those warnings
pairs.why: TechFlow recommended deferral; Meridian's Vance overruled and proceeded

pairs.claim: Meridian did not accept the Platform and no acceptance or sign-off was given at any time
The go-live date was fixed at 1 October 2024 and time was of the essence
pairs.why: SOW calls 1 October a 'target date' subject to change control

pairs.claim: Meridian suffered loss of profit of 4,200,000 pounds during peak trading Nov-Dec 2024
pairs.why: Greenhalgh quantum expert: substantially overstated, ~1.3m supportable, clause 14 may exclude loss of profit

pairs.claim: The Platform contained critical Severity 1 defects in the stock-synchronisation module
pairs.why: Whitfield confirms genuine serious Severity-1 stock-sync defects below standard

pairs.claim: The Platform contained critical Severity 1 defects in the stock-synchronisation module
pairs.why: Defect log records D-001/D-002 Sev 1 stock-sync platform defects

pairs.claim: The total charges payable under the MSA were 2,400,000 pounds excluding VAT
pairs.why: MSA states total charges 2,400,000 ex VAT

pairs.claim: Wasted expenditure being sums paid to TechFlow under the MSA was 1,800,000 pounds
pairs.why: Greenhalgh: 1.8m consistent with records, no reason to challenge

pairs.claim: TechFlow agreed to design, build, configure and implement a cloud inventory and EPOS platform
pairs.why: MSA clause 1.1 imposes exactly this obligation

pairs.claim: TechFlow failed to provide adequate training to Meridian's staff
pairs.why: Quantum accounting report does not address training

pairs.claim: TechFlow orally represented the Platform would support at least 10,000 concurrent transactions
pairs.why: UAT certificate does not address any pre-contractual representation

pairs.claim: The total charges payable under the MSA were 2,400,000 pounds excluding VAT
pairs.why: The 25 Nov outage email does not address the contract price

pairs.claim: The Platform was unavailable for more than 40% of trading hours
pairs.why: The Order Form does not address post-go-live availability
